scripts.db:migrate: sequelize-cli db:migrate --config src/database/config/config.cjs --migrations-path src/database/migrations --seeders-path src/database/seeders --models-path src/database/models --options-path src/database/config/options.json

scripts.db:migrate:undo: sequelize-cli db:migrate:undo --config src/database/config/config.cjs --migrations-path src/database/migrations --seeders-path src/database/seeders --models-path src/database/models --options-path src/database/config/options.json
